scenarios.description: Throws DotenvException when .env file is missing and throwIfMissing=true (branch-false on systemProperties)
scenarios.precondition: Ensure no .env file exists in temporary test directory; using real DotenvReader and DotenvParser

scenarios.description: Returns empty Dotenv when .env is missing but ignoreIfMissing() is set (branch-false on systemProperties)
scenarios.precondition: Ensure no .env file exists in temporary directory; using real parser; ignoreIfMissing() suppresses exception
scenarios.expectedResult: return value is Dotenv instance with entries() empty or matching only system env; entries().stream().noneMatch(e->e.getKey().equals("KEY"));

scenarios.description: Returns Dotenv with single entry from file when systemProperties=false (branch-false)
scenarios.precondition: Create .env in tempDir with ONE_KEY=ONE_VAL; real parser; systemProperties default false

scenarios.description: Sets system properties for zero entries when systemProperties=true (branch-true, loop-0)
scenarios.precondition: Create empty .env in tempDir; real parser; builder.systemProperties();
scenarios.expectedResult: no new system property for any key from file; result.entries().size()>=System.getenv().size();

scenarios.description: Sets a single system property when systemProperties=true and file has one entry (branch-true, loop-1)
scenarios.precondition: Create .env in tempDir with KEY1=VAL1; real parser; builder.systemProperties();

scenarios.description: Sets multiple system properties when systemProperties=true and file has multiple entries (branch-true, loop-N)
scenarios.precondition: Create .env in tempDir with K1=V1,K2=V2,K3=V3; real parser; builder.systemProperties();
scenarios.expectedResult: for each Ki, System.getProperty(Ki)==Vi; result.entries() contains entries for all keys;

scenarios.description: Throws DotenvException when .env file is malformed and throwIfMalformed=true
scenarios.precondition: Create .env in tempDir with malformed content "BAD LINE"; real parser; default throwIfMalformed=true
scenarios.expectedResult: throws io.github.cdimascio.dotenv.DotenvException; no side effects on system properties
